rawContent: {"stage":"review","insights":[{"kind":"gotcha","text":"The verify.md overall result can show FAIL due to pre-existing errors in unrelated files outside the diff, even when the target task passes all checks.","scope":"verify-taskify.ts"},{"kind":"lesson","text":"Unused variables (e.g. issueUrlPattern, issueNumbers) should be prefixed with _ or removed to avoid ESLint noise, even when they have no behavioral impact.","scope":"verify-taskify.ts"},{"kind":"decision","text":"Writing the plan file directly (without subagents or redundant exploration) avoids permission-prompt failures that plague plan-file write attempts.","scope":"plan.md"},{"kind":"convention","text":"kody taskify sub-issues use priority:high/medium/low labels and include ## Context, ## Acceptance Criteria, ## Test Strategy body sections.","scope":"kody taskify"}]}
